texts.desc:
You can only use the (1)st and (2)nd effect of this card’s name each once per turn.
(1) You can target up to 3 cards you control; destroy them, and if you do, Special Summon this card from your hand, then you can apply these effects, in sequence, based on the original types of the destroyed cards.
● Monster: Draw 1 card.
● Spell: Change 1 monster’s battle position.
● Trap: Destroy 1 other card on the field.
(2) If this card on the field is destroyed by card effect: You can destroy all monsters on the field.
texts.name: Unchained Malevolent Magistrate Kamura
